welcome: You have arrived. There is nowhere else to be.

quotes.text: The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
quotes.author: Ram Dass

quotes.text: Emptiness is not a void. It is the ground of being.
quotes.author: Krishnamurti

quotes.text: You are not a drop in the ocean. You are the entire ocean in a drop.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: The present moment is the only moment available to us.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: What you are looking for is what is looking.
quotes.author: Francis of Assisi

quotes.text: Silence is not the absence of sound but the presence of everything.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities.
quotes.author: Shunryu Suzuki

quotes.text: The only way to make sense out of change is to plunge into it.
quotes.author: Alan Watts
